source: Wikimedia Commons File:1913 Ford Model T Speedster speedometer.JPG
verification_method: 1913 Ford Model T Johns-Manville speedometer. Scale runs 5, 10, 15... 60 mph. The black needle is pointing directly at the 5 marker on the left side of the dial. Odometer reads 04126 total. High confidence on needle position at 5 mph.
